globalHeaders.Permissions-Policy: geolocation=(), microphone=(), camera=(), payment=(), usb=(), interest-cohort=()
globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self' https://login.microsoftonline.com
